name: NavMenu
description: Navigation menu with nested groups, links, and auto-expand for active routes.

parameters.name: Rail
parameters.description: Render as slim rail with icons only

parameters.name: Top
parameters.description: Content pinned to the top of the menu

parameters.name: Bottom
parameters.description: Content pinned to the bottom of the menu

examples:
<FlareNavMenu>
    <FlareNavLink Href="/" Icon="home" Title="Home" />
    <FlareNavGroup Title="Reports" Icon="analytics">
        <FlareNavLink Href="/reports/sales" Title="Sales" />
        <FlareNavLink Href="/reports/users" Title="Users" />
    </FlareNavGroup>
</FlareNavMenu>
